series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Veterans Hall of Fame Nomination Packets/Records
series_metadata.series_description: All records pertaining to Ohio Veterans Hall of Fame nominations including, but not limited to, nomination packets, packet scoring documents in DVS possession, and voting records in DVS possession.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until scanned or recorded electronically then dispose. ; Electronic: Retain indefinitely., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent
